methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: admin-only, one-time: opt the app account into the USDC ASA so it can hold escrow

methods.name: createDeal
methods.desc: brand-signed, grouped with (1) USDC axfer of Σ amounts and (2) an ALGO box-rent payment

methods.name: acceptApplication
methods.desc: brand-signed: bind the chosen creator (settable once)

methods.name: submitMilestoneVerdict
methods.desc: AGENT-ORACLE ONLY: attest a verdict. The contract re-checks confidence + threshold itself.

methods.name: releaseMilestone
methods.desc: permissionless: release a tranche AFTER the timelock — to the BOUND creator, the EXACT amount, once

methods.name: dispute
methods.desc: brand-only, within the challenge window: freeze the release for admin review

methods.name: resolveDispute
methods.desc: admin-only: resolve a disputed tranche — pay creator OR refund brand (recipient still bound)

methods.name: refund
methods.desc: brand-only, after the deadline: refund every NON-released tranche back to the brand
